name: Column reading order is preserved for mixed text/table layouts
notes: Needs a fixture with known two-column mixed layout and expected reading-order assertions.

name: Text near table boundaries is preserved unless overlap is significant
notes: Needs fixture and expected near-table text anchors.

name: Markdown table rows remain structurally valid
notes: Needs table-focused fixture set and table-shape assertions.

name: Paragraph stitching does not merge across column resets
notes: Needs fixture with known column break points.

name: Single mode does not inject a generated top-level TOC when PDF has no embedded TOC
Single mode fallback emits one document-level heading for no-TOC PDFs
Recurring running headers/footers are filtered
notes: Needs fixture-specific string blacklist assertions.

name: TOC heading y-anchors are inferred when embedded TOC positions are missing
notes: Needs fixture with embedded TOC but missing positional anchors.

name: Ambiguous same-page heading boundaries do not overlap content
notes: Needs fixture and section-boundary overlap assertions.

name: Front matter is preserved before first detected heading
Table-leading row numbers are not converted to footnote superscripts
notes: Needs fixture with numbered table row starts.

name: "as follows:" strand lines are converted to markdown bullets
notes: Needs fixture containing target phrase.

name: Stray <sup>n</sup> table-row prefixes are removed
notes: Needs fixture with known problematic superscript prefixes.

name: All conversion modes generate expected layout
Single-mode output filename matches PDF basename
Locked output file reports clear lock error without full-tree deletion
notes: Needs deterministic lock simulation on Windows.

name: Invalid/corrupt PDF returns clear error message
notes: Needs dedicated corrupt fixture and message assertions.

name: Python/PyMuPDF detection honors override env vars
notes: Needs controlled multi-interpreter test environment.

name: Packaged app script path resolution avoids spawn ENOTDIR
notes: Packaged-app integration check.

name: Windows packaged conversion launches without console window
notes: Requires packaged Windows app runtime.

name: Section hint auto-hides when not applicable
notes: GUI behavior check.

name: Section pane resets scroll to top on section change
notes: GUI behavior check.

name: Drag/drop path normalization supports file URI and Windows path variants
notes: GUI behavior check.

name: Drag/drop rejects invalid payloads cleanly
notes: GUI behavior check.

name: Legacy multi-part outputs remain readable in section viewer
notes: Requires legacy output fixtures and GUI section viewer validation.
